hypothesis_queue.hypothesis: Production-aligned baseline (PROD_PARAMS) exposes that Params defaults diverged from live system; stagnation exit (stag_bars < max_hold_bars) frees capital from dead trades — stagnation is currently disabled in production (stag_bars == max_hold_bars == 390)
hypothesis_queue.test: python scripts/research_backtest.py --phase stagnation (4 variants: stag_bars ∈ {390 disabled, 195 50pct, 260 67pct, 312 80pct}); acceptance = Sharpe improvement on BOTH tune AND validation legs
hypothesis_queue.pm_priority_note: Provides first true production-comparable backtest (PROD_PARAMS). Stagnation re-enable is clean, orthogonal to H1-H6, zero risk to risk controls.
hypothesis_queue.bug_fix_included: simulate() crashed with AttributeError on 0-trade legs (pre-existing bug, same as fixed in PR #10); patched in this PR.
hypothesis_queue.expected_impact: PROD_PARAMS baseline: unknown until Railway backtest (first production-comparable run). Stagnation at 50%: shorter avg_hold, potentially higher capital turnover. Mechanism: exit dead-in-the-water positions early to deploy capital in fresher opportunities. Risk: may exit trades that would have recovered — the stag_pnl gate (|unreal| < 0.4%) mitigates by only targeting truly flat positions.

hypothesis_queue.hypothesis: Cross-sectional daily top-k ranking (long top 3-4 by LGBM pred at 14:00 ET, exit next day) beats per-ticker threshold entries
hypothesis_queue.test: python scripts/research_backtest.py --phase topk (4 variants: k∈{3,4} × snapshot∈{13:00,14:00 ET}); acceptance = improvement on BOTH tune AND hold-out legs
hypothesis_queue.pr_state: DRAFT — held pending Railway backtest; freeze intact
hypothesis_queue.pm_priority_note: Highest architectural change; backtest required before merge. Lower run priority than H5/H2 which are already deployed and need validation first.

hypothesis_queue.hypothesis: SPY/QQQ regime overlay (only deploy full heat when SPY > 20d MA) improves Sharpe by cutting down-tape exposure
hypothesis_queue.test: python scripts/research_backtest.py --phase spy_ma (4 variants: MA period × below-MA action)
hypothesis_queue.pr_state: DRAFT — combined with H6 spy_ma + persistence backtest phases
hypothesis_queue.expected_impact: Reduced long-side exposure during down-tape markets. Sharpe improvement mechanism: fewer losing entries against market headwinds.
hypothesis_queue.pm_priority_note: Already deployed in production (merged Jul 11); backtest measures real effect.

hypothesis_queue.hypothesis: Earnings-calendar blackout (no entries within 2 days of earnings) removes uncompensated gap risk on 1-day holds
hypothesis_queue.test: BLOCKED — historical earnings dates not available via yfinance (future-only API). Requires paid data source (Alpaca corporate actions or EOD Historical Data) for proper backtest.
hypothesis_queue.index_risk_quant_verdict: APPROVED_FOR_STAGING — no lookahead (earnings date is known before announcement), fail-open, no risk control modification. N unknown until Railway backtest.
hypothesis_queue.pm_priority_note: Backtest infrastructure blocked (no historical earnings dates via yfinance). Log as data-dependency blocker.

hypothesis_queue.hypothesis: Removing dead ensemble weights (Transformer/TCN contribute 0.0 in every live trade) and renormalizing LGBM 60->75, sentiment 20->25 sharpens the entry signal
hypothesis_queue.test: IC comparison of reweighted ensemble on validation window
hypothesis_queue.index_risk_quant_verdict: APPROVED_FOR_STAGING — calibration correction only. Needs data run for IC delta confirmation.
hypothesis_queue.pm_priority_note: Calibration fix already in production; IC delta confirmation useful but not blocking.

hypothesis_queue.hypothesis: Signal-reconfirmed hold extension: at max_hold (390 bars), if the ticker re-qualifies as a FRESH entry, extend one more day instead of exiting. Hard caps: max 2 extensions (3 days absolute).
hypothesis_queue.test: python scripts/research_backtest.py --phase holdext (4 variants: max_ext ∈ {1,2} × loss_gate_mult ∈ {1.0,2.0}); acceptance = improvement on BOTH legs
hypothesis_queue.index_risk_quant_verdict: APPROVED_FOR_STAGING — signal-conditional, fail-safe guards in place. N unknown until Railway backtest.
hypothesis_queue.pm_priority_note: Highest Railway backtest priority: owner-requested, strongest live evidence base (5W/4L max_hold cohort). PR #9 added --phase holdext Jul 16.

hypothesis_queue.hypothesis: Signal persistence filter: require N consecutive qualifying bars before allowing entry — reduces noise-driven entries
hypothesis_queue.test: python scripts/research_backtest.py --phase persistence (N ∈ {0 baseline, 1, 2, 3}); acceptance = improvement on BOTH legs
hypothesis_queue.pr_state: DRAFT — combined with H2 spy_ma backtest phase
hypothesis_queue.index_risk_quant_verdict: APPROVED_FOR_STAGING — N=0 is exactly baseline (backward compatible), no lookahead, no risk control modification.
hypothesis_queue.pm_priority_note: Orthogonal to H1-H5; clean mechanism. Lower priority than H5/H2 for Railway.
